title: Stenoloma chusanum
taxonomy: Stenoloma chusanum is classified as a species of fern in the family Lomariopsidaceae. This species is native to East Asia. Within the kingdom Plantae, Stenoloma chusanum belongs to the division Pteridophyta, which comprises all ferns. Further classification places it in the order Polypodiales and the family Lomariopsidaceae. The genus Stenoloma is a relatively small group of ferns, with a few species found in East Asia.
uses: Stenoloma chusanum is a species of fern, however, limited information is available regarding its medicinal uses.
